MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-17-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT WAI SUN SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 7, 2015, TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 17, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WAI SUN SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM AND IS UNCERTAIN. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 425.10 WHICH REQUIRES THAT A COMPLAINT CONTAIN BOTH OF THE FOLLOWING: 1) "A STATEMENT OF FACTS CONSTITUTING THE CAUSE OF ACTION, IN ORDINARY AND CONCISE LANGUAGE" AND 2) A STATEMENT OF THE RELIEF THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2016 CONTINUED TO MAR-09-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO SERVE ORDER RE DEMURRER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WAI SUN SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with thirty days leave to amend. The complaint fails to state a claim and is uncertain. Plaintiff is given the opportunity to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 425.10 which requires that a complaint contain both of the following: 1) "A statement of facts constituting the cause of action, in ordinary and concise language" and 2) a statement of the relief that plaintiff seeks. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WAI SUN SUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 7, 2015, to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 17, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)
